title: Student organizations
doc_html:
§2115.6.  Student organizations

No student organization at any public elementary or secondary school shall be denied recognition or any privilege or benefit solely because it is religious in nature, has a religious affiliation, or has no religious affiliation.

Acts 1995, No. 264, §1.
